close_reason: Env var validation deferred to first call is by design: allows construction without network
description: lib.rs:18-24 documents that ?server= is validated eagerly at from_uri() and WOLFHSM_SERVER is validated at first use. The asymmetry is intentional and called out, but a one-line concrete consequence would help: 'A WolfHsmBackend constructed with no ?server= and a malformed WOLFHSM_SERVER env var will succeed at from_uri() and return SecretError::InvalidUri at first get()/put().' Currently the asymmetry is buried.
title: ?server= rustdoc says falls back to WOLFHSM_SERVER but does not warn that env-var validation is deferred to first call
